rag_rules: Place output range guarantees in component type annexes using visible feature names and concrete bounds from the requirement.
Use eq to define boolean range predicates before referencing them in guarantees.
generic_rules: Guarantees should express observable system behavior using declared or visible features, not AADL properties.
Define intermediate boolean conditions with eq to improve contract clarity and type safety.
syntax_or_pattern_reminders: Use annex agree {** ... **}; for all AGREE contracts.
AGREE scalar types are int, real, bool — never integer or boolean.
anti_patterns: Do not reference AADL properties (e.g., Period, Deadline) as variables in AGREE expressions.
Do not place guarantee statements in implementation scopes.
irrelevant_topics: AADL Property Names Are Not AGREE Variables
